coreDesignSystem.silhouette: Positive white female profile (right-facing side view: forehead, nose, lips, chin-neck) — solid fill, NOT a cutout
coreDesignSystem.ring: 1px stroke at rgba(255,255,255,0.25) — definition ring for non-dark contexts
rationale: Circle = modern app icon standard (all major platforms)
Gradient circle readable at 16px as colored dot = instant brand recognition
Positive silhouette (not cutout) works on ALL backgrounds — no dark/light variant needed for the mark itself
Removing SZ letters from the mark simplifies it — they belong only in the wordmark

files.description: New circle mark with gradient background + feminine profile silhouette. No SZ letters in the mark.
files.props: size, theme, className, idPrefix — same API, no breaking changes

files.description: Add letter-spacing: 0.03em (tracking-wide), increase font-weight to 800, keep S/Z color emphasis. Add optional tagline prop for OG context.

Full circle mark with silhouette. PWA icon.
Full circle mark with silhouette. Large PWA icon.
